mapper.sql: pk AS pk, case_id AS caseId, content_zh_CN AS contentZhCn, content_en_US AS contentEnUs, summary_status AS summaryStatus, summary_error AS summaryError, summary_updated_at AS summaryUpdatedAt, insert_time AS insertTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO case_detail_info (case_id, content_zh_CN, content_en_US, summary_status, summary_updated_at) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{contentZhCn}, #{contentEnUs}, 'DONE', NOW())
INSERT INTO case_detail_info (case_id, summary_status, summary_updated_at) VALUES (#{caseId}, 'RUNNING', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE case_detail_info SET summary_status = #{status}, summary_error = #{error}, summary_updated_at = NOW() WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
UPDATE case_detail_info SET content_zh_CN = #{contentZhCn}, content_en_US = #{contentEnUs}, summary_status = 'DONE', summary_error = NULL, summary_updated_at = NOW() WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
UPDATE case_detail_info SET content_zh_CN = NULL, content_en_US = NULL, summary_status = 'RUNNING', summary_error = NULL, summary_updated_at = NOW() WHERE case_id = #{caseId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM case_detail_info WHERE (content_zh_CN IS NOT NULL AND content_zh_CN != '') OR (content_en_US IS NOT NULL AND content_en_US != '') ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
